name: HaHa-medium (HaHa_100V) with 0.1% (w/v) purified diatom sulfated alpha-1,3-mannan as limiting carbon source (PMC13063451)
description: HaHa-medium (HaHa_100V) with 0.1% (w/v) purified diatom sulfated alpha-1,3-mannan as limiting carbon source — medium reported in PMC13063451 (complex/undefined base — extracts not BiGG-mappable).

provenance.citation: Medium composition from PMC13063451 (see GrowthDB record).
provenance.notes: Complex medium: chemically-defined portion mapped to BiGG; biological extracts listed in `unmapped`. Added via GrowthDB curation.
provenance.verification_evidence: Polaribacter sp. Hel1_33_49 was grown in 3.5% Sea Salts (Sigma) with supplements [90]. The mannan was used as limiting carbon source at a concentration of 1 mg mL-1 ... in HaHa-medium supplemented with 0.1 mg mL-1 yeast extract ... The medium contained 3.5% Sea Salt as well as nitrogen, phosphate and other essential nutrients.

Yeast extract.citation: Yeast extract supplies free amino acids, B-vitamins (thiamine, riboflavin, niacin, pantothenate, pyridoxine, folate, biotin, B12), nucleotides and minerals — BD Bionutrient Technical Manual (3rd ed.); Atlas RM, Handbook of Microbiological Media (CRC Press, 4th ed. 2010).
